title: MonitoredCall
description: A real-time arrival or departure prediction for a specific vehicle at a specific stop within a monitored journey.

stopPointRef.description: Reference to the stop point for this call

visitNumber.description: Visit sequence number for loop services

vehicleAtStop.description: Whether the vehicle is currently at the stop

expectedArrivalTime.description: Predicted arrival time at this stop

expectedDepartureTime.description: Predicted departure time from this stop

aimedArrivalTime.description: Scheduled arrival time from the timetable

aimedDepartureTime.description: Scheduled departure time from the timetable

id.description: Unique identifier for the tracking record

url.description: URL endpoint for real-time tracking information

validity.description: Validity period for this tracking record
